result.summary: 25 TDD unit tests across 7 test classes. All fail with ModuleNotFoundError. Covers: AnalyticalIntent enum, Q14/Q15/Q20 detection, distribution types (publisher/language/subject/geographic/temporal), NOT_ANALYTICAL classification for retrieval queries, anti-signal tests, implied filter extraction (Hebrew->heb, Latin->lat, 16th century->1500-1599), case insensitivity, result model contracts.
